gate_metrics.note: Evaluated 400/400 ground-truth sessions (those present in the log file). F1 benchmark: ≥0.90 (LogHub HDFS standard).

root_cause_specificity.description: Root cause is specific, non-generic, and references actual session components.

grounding.description: Every line cited in failure_trace exists verbatim (or near-verbatim) in the session.

completeness.description: Explanation addresses all major anomalous events visible in the session.

severity_calibration.description: Severity label (critical/high/medium/low) is appropriate given the evidence.

actionability.description: Recommended actions are specific, concrete, and tied to this session.

retrieval_relevance.description: Retrieved historical examples are relevant to the current failure pattern.

composite_weighted.note: Grounding has 1.5× weight (hallucination is highest-risk failure mode).
